name: phpdot/server-swoole
description: Swoole HTTP server adapter for PSR-15. Framework-agnostic.

suggest.phpdot/container: Required for the framework's manifest scanner to auto-wire ServerConfig from config/server.php via the #[Config] attribute. The attribute is inert at runtime; standalone consumers don't need it installed.
suggest.phpdot/container-swoole: Provides SwooleContextProvider for per-coroutine isolation of Scoped services. Recommended for any phpdot app running under this server.
suggest.phpdot/error-handler: PSR-15 middleware that catches application exceptions and renders safe error responses. The server's last-resort handler passes the raw exception message through, so add this to your middleware stack to avoid leaking internal errors to clients.
